name: podc-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM PODC (Symposium on Principles of Distributed Computing), the SIGACT-SIGOPS distributed-computing-theory flagship: routing among PODC/DISC/SPAA/STOC/SODA, the lightweight double-blind HotCRP submission, the 10-page ACM proceedings budget with unbounded full version, proof-appendix and model/assumption rigor (in place of artifact evaluation), the Brief Announcements track, the arXiv full-version norm, and the PODC camera-ready. Grounded in the PODC 2026 call for papers, podc.org, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
